name: ahp-conformance-runner
description: AHP host-conformance runner (build-phase B4). A scripted replay CLIENT that loads a *.scenario.json, starts the B3 scenario-driven host, connects over a REAL WebSocket, replays the client.request steps, applies server.notify action envelopes through the CANONICAL in-repo sessionReducer/rootReducer/terminalReducer/changesetReducer/resourceWatchReducer, and checks every client.assert.* step. No mocks: real files, real ws transport, real reducer, real assertions. Depends on the in-repo TypeScript client (file: dependency) for the canonical reducers — no published package.
